== Notes for [[Item:Q87471|Q87471]] ==

===Please See===
'''Vives, Juan Luis.'' Early Writings''': De Initiis Sectis Et Laudibus Philosophiae, Veritas Fucata, Anima Senis, Pompeius Fugiens. Introduction, Critical Edition, Translation and Notes''. Edited by Constant Matheeussen, Charles Fantazzi, and Edward George. Translated by Charles Fantazzi. I. Vol. I. Brill, 1987.

[https://www.google.com/books/edition/J_L_Vives_De_Institutione_Feminae_Christ/_9-iEiscTyMC?hl=en&gbpv=1&dq=Cornelia+II+SCIPIONIA&pg=PA72&printsec=frontcover]
(Kenneth L. Shelley)

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
